'''hasomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldskool|oldskool]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldskool|oldskool]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hasomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsemeth|hæsemeth]] || [[word:hæsemej|hæsemej]] || [[word:hæsemesh|hæsemesh]] || [[word:hæseme|hæseme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasosomoth|hasosomoth]] || [[word:hasosomoj|hasosomoj]] || [[word:hasosomosh|hasosomosh]] || [[word:hasosomo|hasosomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasomoth|hasomoth]] || [[word:hasomoj|hasomoj]] || [[word:hasomosh|hasomosh]] || [[word:hasomo|hasomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasofmofth|hasofmofth]] || [[word:hasofmofj|hasofmofj]] || [[word:hasofmofsh|hasofmofsh]] || [[word:hasofmof|hasofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasomotho|hasomotho]] || [[word:hasomojo|hasomojo]] || [[word:hasomosho|hasomosho]] || [[word:hasomoko|hasomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasomoth|hasomoth]] || [[word:hasomoj|hasomoj]] || [[word:hasomosh|hasomosh]] || [[word:hasomo|hasomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasomothol|hasomothol]] || [[word:hasomojol|hasomojol]] || [[word:hasomoshol|hasomoshol]] || [[word:hasomokol|hasomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasomoothotho|hasomoothotho]] || [[word:hasomoojojo|hasomoojojo]] || [[word:hasomooshosho|hasomooshosho]] || [[word:hasomooko|hasomooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasomothon|hasomothon]] || [[word:hasomojon|hasomojon]] || [[word:hasomoshon|hasomoshon]] || [[word:hasomokon|hasomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasomothooro|hasomothooro]] || [[word:hasomojooro|hasomojooro]] || [[word:hasomoshooro|hasomoshooro]] || [[word:hasomokooro|hasomokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
